messages.subject: [R-sig-genetics] New release of poppr version 2.5.0
messages.body_plain:
It's my pleasure to announce that there is a new release of poppr available for download on CRAN now.
Version 2.5.0 contains major bug fixes to Bruvo's distance (bug fix for polyploids) and read.genalex.
Details: https://github.com/grunwaldlab/poppr/releases/tag/v.2.5.0

Additionally, as a reminder, Thibaut Jombart (author of adegenet) and I will be leading a course on Reproducible Data Science For Population Genetics in October.
Details: https://www.prstatistics.com/course/reproducible-data-science-for-population-genetics-rdpg01/

Cheers,
Zhian

-----
Zhian N. Kamvar, Ph. D.
Postdoctoral Researcher (Everhart Lab)
Department of Plant Pathology
University of Nebraska-Lincoln
ORCID: 0000-0003-1458-7108
